marked_piece_destination_count: {movement_rule_text} How many simple-move destinations does the X-marked piece have?
{movement_rule_text} Count the adjacent empty points the X-marked piece can reach with one simple move.
{movement_rule_text} What is the number of one-step destinations for the X-marked piece?
{movement_rule_text} Count only empty points connected to the X-marked piece by one drawn line segment.
{movement_rule_text} How many adjacent empty points can the X-marked piece reach without a capture jump?
capture_move_count: {capture_rule_text} How many legal moves for the X-marked piece would capture at least one opposing piece?
{capture_rule_text} Count the legal capture moves for the X-marked piece.
{capture_rule_text} What is the number of jump-over capture moves for the X-marked piece?
{capture_rule_text} Count only landing points where the X-marked piece would capture an opposing piece.
{capture_rule_text} How many empty landing points can the X-marked piece reach by a capture jump?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_open_position: a radial point-and-line hunt board with three concentric circles, three diameters, and a few pieces
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_mixed_position: a radial point-and-line hunt board with three concentric circles, three diameters, and several pieces
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_crowded_position: a radial point-and-line hunt board with three concentric circles, three diameters, and many pieces
code_prompt_defaults.movement_rule_text: A simple move goes one step along a drawn circle or diameter line to an adjacent empty point. Do not count capture jumps.
code_prompt_defaults.capture_rule_text: A capture move jumps over one adjacent opposing piece along the same drawn circle or diameter line and lands on the empty point immediately beyond it.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_marked_piece_destination: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points at the centers of every one-step adjacent empty destination for the X-marked piece; use an empty array when the count is 0
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_marked_piece_destination_cou: set "answer" to the number of one-step adjacent empty destinations for the X-marked piece
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_capture_move_count: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points at the centers of every empty point where the X-marked piece can land by a capture jump; use an empty array if there are none
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_capture_move_count: set "answer" to the number of legal capture moves for the X-marked piece
